name: Entra Risky Active Accounts Missing Email
description: Detects active entra_risky accounts missing an email address for identity matching and offboarding controls.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.id AS account_name FROM entra_risky_users u WHERE 1=1 AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.user_principal_name), '') = ''
remediation: Populate a valid corporate email on the account or disable the account until ownership can be verified.
